summary: Completed frontend testing for Tasks page redesign. All 9 requested features are working correctly. The slide-in panel opens on '+ Add Task' click, shows all required form fields (Company Name, Deal, Status, PIC Name, Sales Person, Payment), PIC Name auto-fills from company selection, create/edit/delete task functionality works, and deals filter dropdown filters tasks correctly.
passed_tests: Tasks page loads correctly with table columns: NO., COMPANY NAME, DEAL, STATUS, PIC NAME
Click '+ Add Task' button opens slide-in panel from right side
Panel shows correct title 'Add New Task' with 'TASK DETAILS' section header
Panel shows all form fields: Company Name*, Deal*, Status*, PIC Name, Sales Person*, Payment*
Selecting a company auto-fills PIC Name field (e.g., 'AAFIYA CLINIC' -> 'Dr. Ahmad Fauzi')
Create task with linked deal shows deal name in table (GLOCO Cloud EMR in yellow/primary color)
Task status badge displays correctly (Lead - blue badge)
Edit task functionality works via action dropdown - opens panel with pre-populated values
Delete task functionality works - confirms with dialog and removes task from table
Filter by 'All Deals' dropdown works - contains All Deals option and deal names for filtering
critical_code_review_comments: Tasks.jsx line 129-137: handleCompanyChange correctly auto-fills pic_name from lead data
SlideInPanel.jsx properly handles animation and close events (Escape key, overlay click)
Form validation requires Company Name selection before task creation (line 141-144)
All form fields have data-testid attributes for robust automated testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Lead 'AAFIYA CLINIC' with PIC 'Dr. Ahmad Fauzi', Deal 'GLOCO Cloud EMR'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tasks page fully tested with all features working: 1) Table shows NO., COMPANY NAME, DEAL, STATUS, PIC NAME columns, 2) '+ Add Task' opens slide-in panel from right with all form fields, 3) Company selection auto-fills PIC Name, 4) Task creation shows success toast and adds task to table, 5) Action dropdown has Edit/Sync to Calendar/Delete options, 6) Edit opens panel with pre-populated form, 7) Delete removes task after confirmation, 8) Deals filter filters tasks by selected deal. Test credentials: demo@test.com / Demo123!

features_verified.delete_functionality: Working - Deletes task with confirmation dialog
features_verified.deals_filter: Working - Filters tasks by selected deal
